@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+{
+  "compilerOptions": {
+    "target": "ES2022",
+    "module": "ESNext",
+    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
+    "lib": [
+      "ES2022"
+    ],
+    "strict": true,
+    "esModuleInterop": true,
+    "skipLibCheck": true,
+    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
+    "declaration": true,
+    "declarationMap": true,
+    "sourceMap": true,
+    "resolveJsonModule": true,
+    "isolatedModules": true,
+    "noUnusedLocals": false,
+    "noUnusedParameters": false,
+    "noImplicitReturns": true,
+    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
+    "noImplicitAny": false,
+    "composite": true,
+    "incremental": true,
+    "outDir": "./dist",
+    "rootDir": "./src",
+    "emitDeclarationOnly": false,
+    "tsBuildInfoFile": "/workspaces/claude-flow/v3/node_modules/.pnpm/vitest@1.6.1_@types+node@20.19.27/node_modules/vitest/dist/vendor/tsconfig.tmp.tsbuildinfo"
+  },
+  "include": [
+    "src/**/*"
+  ],
+  "exclude": [
+    "node_modules",
+    "dist",
+    "./dist"
+  ]
+}
